title: Pentapogon lacustris
taxonomy: Pentapogon lacustris is classified as a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Pentapogon, which consists of several species of grasses. Pentapogon lacustris is further classified as a member of the subfamily Danthonioideae. This classification indicates that Pentapogon lacustris is a type of danthonia grass, which is native to Australia. The family Poaceae is a large and diverse group of monocotyledonous plants commonly known as grasses.
